series_metadata.series_description: Records which document significant agency functions, programs, and/or procedures.

tracking_data.comments:
Paper records transferred to Texas
State Library and Archives
Commission (TSLAC) when no
longer have any administrative
value.

Retain paper copy five years, then
digitally. Paper copy forwarded to
TSLAC for archival requirement.

series_metadata.series_title: Audio or Videotapes of Open Meetings

tracking_data.comments:
Kept electronically and/or
microfilm. Microfilm copy
forwarded to TSLAC for archival
requirment.

Complaints that are subject of
litigation, see item number 1.1.048.

Includes letters and complaints
between Board and optical
companies.

CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission, by law
(Government Code §441.101-
441.106). The Texas State Library
and Archives Commission will retain
a copy of all state publications
submitted to it on a continuing
basis, subject to periodic evaluation
to determine if the publication
merits further retention.
Original retained by TSLAC.

Kept in paper and microfilm. Paper

longer of administrative value, then
destroyed. Microfilm stored at

Imaged after closed plus one (1)
year. Hard copy destroyed.

94-514-001 (1 prior year to current
year). Original kept at agency,
duplicate stored at TSLAC for total
period of 25 years.

Imaged after closed and maintained
electronically.

Imaged after closed plus three (3)
years, then hard copy destroyed.

destroyed.

permanently.

series_metadata.series_title: Documentation or Verification of Employment Eligibility (INS I-9)

tracking_data.comments:
I-9 forms must be maintained a
minimum of 3 years from date of
hire. 8 CFR 274a.2(b)(2)(i)(A) and
(c)(2).
